decisions.name: Face detection using YOLOv5 model
decisions.rationale: The system uses contours detection to detect the borders of objects, Gaussian blur to mute image noise, Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts, and Histogram Equalization for image contrast optimization.

decisions.name: Gesture recognition using threading and multiprocessing
decisions.rationale: The system uses threading for concurrent execution of tasks within a single process and multiprocessing for parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes.

decisions.name: Hand tracking using Background Subtraction (BS)
decisions.rationale: The system uses Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts.

decisions.name: Customizable actions for specific gestures
decisions.rationale: The system uses the YOLOv5 model for face detection.

decisions.name: Real-time collaboration
decisions.rationale: The system supports interactions on the projected surface.

decisions.name: Low-latency
decisions.rationale: The system analyzes gestures and reflects the corresponding action on the projected surface.

decisions.name: Cost-effective
decisions.rationale: The system must be affordable to many and have a competitive price compared to other systems in the market.

decisions.name: Flexible
decisions.rationale: The system must work effectively in different places and environments.

decisions.name: User-friendly interface
decisions.rationale: The system must be easy to use and have interactive features.

decisions.name: Secure
decisions.rationale: The system must store user account information securely.

decisions.name: Scalable
decisions.rationale: The system must support multiple users and interactions.

components.name: Face Detection Module
components.responsibility: Detect the user's face using the YOLOv5 model, contours detection, Gaussian blur, Background Subtraction (BS), and Histogram Equalization.

components.name: Gesture Recognition Module
components.responsibility: Recognize gestures using threading for concurrent execution of tasks within a single process and multiprocessing for parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes.

components.name: Hand Tracking Module
components.responsibility: Track the user's hand using Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts.

components.name: Interaction Module
components.responsibility: Support single-hand interaction, exclude multiple-hand interaction, and allow users to customize actions for specific gestures.

components.name: Real-time Collaboration Module
components.responsibility: Enable real-time collaboration by supporting interactions on the projected surface.

components.name: Latency Reduction Module
components.responsibility: Analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface with low-latency.
